feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: Machine Learning Engineer and Lecturer focused on multimodal AI, fairness, safety, medical imaging, and VLM reasoning.

entry.title: Building Medical-ExpertVLM Systems
entry.content:
This post summarizes implementation notes for medical VLM assistants, including OCR extraction, annotation loops, and explainability constraints for clinical settings.

Placeholder sections are included for case studies and model comparison charts.
entry.summary: Notes from building explainable medical VLM assistants.

entry.title: Fairness Challenges in Vision-Language Models
entry.content:
This post outlines practical fairness risks in VLM pipelines and a framework for evaluating performance gaps across demographic groups.

Placeholder sections are included for upcoming experiments and benchmark links.
entry.summary: Bias patterns and mitigation ideas in VLM systems.
